phrases.english: Tilak was a great leader of India.
phrases.hindi: तिलक भारत के महान नेता थे.

quiz.question: What is the English meaning of 'टिळक भारताचे थोर नेते होते.'?
options: Tilak was a great leader of India.
quiz.explanation: 'टिळक भारताचे थोर नेते होते.' translates to 'Tilak was a great leader of India.'.

quiz.question: Which is the correct Marathi translation for 'Water is life.'?

flashcards.back: Tilak was a great leader of India.

questions.question: Translate to Marathi: 'The baby laughed very sweetly.'
questions.explanation: 'बाळ खूप गोड हसले.' means 'The baby laughed very sweetly.'.

questions.question: What is the transliteration of 'टिळक भारताचे थोर नेते होते.'?
questions.explanation: The phonetic spelling is 'Tilak bhaarataache thor nete hote.'.

questions.question: Translate to English: 'पाणी जीवन आहे.'
options: Tilak was a great leader of India.
questions.explanation: 'पाणी जीवन आहे.' translates to 'Water is life.'.

phrases.hindi: जो गरजते हैं वे बरसते नहीं.

phrases.english: The situation is the same everywhere.
Empty vessels make the most noise.
An over-smart person ends up in loss.
phrases.hindi: अति बुद्धिमान व्यक्ति अंततः नुकसान में रहता है.

quiz.question: What is the English meaning of 'गर्जे तो पडेल काय?'?
options: The situation is the same everywhere.
Empty vessels make the most noise.
quiz.explanation: 'गर्जे तो पडेल काय?' translates to 'Those who boast rarely act.'.

quiz.question: Which is the correct Marathi translation for 'The situation is the same everywhere.'?
quiz.explanation: 'पळसाला पाने तीनच.' means 'The situation is the same everywhere.'.

flashcards.back: The situation is the same everywhere.
Empty vessels make the most noise.
An over-smart person ends up in loss.

questions.question: Translate to Marathi: 'Empty vessels make the most noise.'
questions.explanation: 'उथळ पाण्याला खळखळाट फार.' means 'Empty vessels make the most noise.'.

questions.question: What is the transliteration of 'गर्जे तो पडेल काय?'?
questions.explanation: The phonetic spelling is 'Garje to padel kaay?'.

questions.question: Translate to English: 'पळसाला पाने तीनच.'
options: The situation is the same everywhere.
questions.explanation: 'पळसाला पाने तीनच.' translates to 'The situation is the same everywhere.'.

phrases.marathi: लोड नका घेऊ, काम होऊन जाईल.
phrases.transliteration: Load naka gheu, kaam houn jaail.
phrases.english: Do not take stress, the work will be done.
phrases.hindi: तनाव मत लो, काम हो जाएगा.

phrases.marathi: तिथे खूप राडा झाला काल रात्री.
phrases.transliteration: Tithe khoop raada zala kaal raatri.
phrases.english: There was a big fight there last night.
phrases.hindi: वहाँ कल रात बहुत हंगामा हुआ.

phrases.marathi: बिंधास्त जा, काही काळजी नको करू.
phrases.transliteration: Bindhaast ja, kaahi kaalaji nako karu.
phrases.english: Go carefree, do not worry about anything.
phrases.hindi: बिंदास जाओ, कोई चिंता मत करो.

phrases.english: What's up, what's going on friend?
phrases.hindi: और बताओ, क्या चल रहा है दोस्त?

quiz.question: What is the English meaning of 'लोड नका घेऊ, काम होऊन जाईल.'?
options: Do not take stress, the work will be done.
There was a big fight there last night.
Go carefree, do not worry about anything.
quiz.explanation: 'लोड नका घेऊ, काम होऊन जाईल.' translates to 'Do not take stress, the work will be done.'.

quiz.question: Which is the correct Marathi translation for 'There was a big fight there last night.'?
options: लोड नका घेऊ, काम होऊन जाईल.
तिथे खूप राडा झाला काल रात्री.
quiz.explanation: 'तिथे खूप राडा झाला काल रात्री.' means 'There was a big fight there last night.'.

flashcards.back: What's up, what's going on friend?

options: लोड नका घेऊ, काम होऊन जाईल.

phrases.marathi: तू उद्या सकाळी नक्की वेळेवर पोहोचशील का?
phrases.transliteration: Tu udya sakaali nakki velevar pohachashil ka?
phrases.english: Will you definitely arrive on time tomorrow morning?
phrases.hindi: क्या तुम कल सुबह निश्चित रूप से समय पर पहुँच जाओगे?

phrases.marathi: लवकरात लवकर हे काम संपवून टाक.
phrases.transliteration: Lavakaraat lavakar he kaam sampavoon taak.
phrases.english: Finish this work as soon as possible.
phrases.hindi: जल्द से जल्द यह काम खत्म कर दो.

Finish this work as soon as possible.

phrases.marathi: मराठी शिकणे हा एक खूप छान प्रवास होता.

phrases.hindi: मराठी सीखना एक बहुत ही शानदार यात्रा थी.

phrases.marathi: अभिनंदन, तुम्ही आता उत्तम मराठी बोलू शकता!
phrases.transliteration: Abhinandan, tumhi aata uttam marathi bolu shakata!

phrases.hindi: बधाई हो, अब आप बेहतरीन मराठी बोल सकते हैं!

अभिनंदन, तुम्ही आता उत्तम मराठी बोलू शकता!

flashcards.back: Learning Marathi was a very wonderful journey.
flashcards.transliteration: Marathi shikane ha ek khoop thaan pravaas hota.

flashcards.front: अभिनंदन, तुम्ही आता उत्तम मराठी बोलू शकता!
flashcards.back: Congratulations, you can now speak excellent Marathi!
flashcards.transliteration: Abhinandan, tumhi aata uttam marathi bolu shakata!

questions.question: Translate to Marathi: 'Hello / Greetings'
options: मराठी शिकणे हा एक खूप छान प्रवास होता.
अभिनंदन, तुम्ही आता उत्तम मराठी बोलू शकता!

questions.question: What is the transliteration of 'मराठी शिकणे हा एक खूप छान प्रवास होता.'?
options: Abhinandan, tumhi aata uttam marathi bolu shakata!
Marathi shikane ha ek khoop thaan pravaas hota.
questions.explanation: The phonetic spelling is 'Marathi shikane ha ek khoop thaan pravaas hota.'.

questions.question: Translate to English: 'अभिनंदन, तुम्ही आता उत्तम मराठी बोलू शकता!'
options: Learning Marathi was a very wonderful journey.
Congratulations, you can now speak excellent Marathi!
questions.explanation: 'अभिनंदन, तुम्ही आता उत्तम मराठी बोलू शकता!' translates to 'Congratulations, you can now speak excellent Marathi!'.
